title: Mob Masks Armour
description: This pack adds a mask of a mob to all armours(armors) so you can get ready for halloween.
body:
# Mobs Masks Armour
This pack adds masks to vanilla armour which makes you look ready for halloween. The masks are of mobs which make the theme or colour of the armour.
## The Masks for Each Armour.
- Leather Armour - Zombie Mask
- Chain Armour - Skeleton Mask
- Copper Armour - Copper Golem Mask
- Iron Armour - Iron Golem Mask
- Gold Armour - Piglin Mask
- Diamond Armour - Breeze Mask
- Netherite Armour - Wither Mask
- Turtle Shell - Turtle Mask

![Most Masks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb78f75a7ca80061630d0bd93555067c4e0053ff.png)
